reasoning:
On August 11, 2025, Bloomberg reported that TransDigm launched a $4 billion debt deal to fund a $4.3 billion special cash dividend. With ~57 million shares, this will result in a special dividend of roughly $75 per share. Resolution relies strictly on unadjusted market close prices (no adjustment for dividends, only splits). Once the dividend goes ex-date, the stock will mechanically drop by ~$75. 

Using the 2024 timeline as a reference (debt Sept 3, declared Sept 20, ex-date Oct 4), we expect the ex-date to be around mid-September 2025 (e.g., ~Sept 11).
- 2025-08-24: Will resolve before the ex-dividend date. Expecting a normal short-term drift but pressured by recent negative earnings momentum. (0.46)
- 2025-09-16: High probability the stock has just gone ex-dividend, causing a mechanical $75 drop. It will be very hard to recover this in a short time. (0.28)
- 2025-11-15: The ex-dividend will have definitively occurred. The stock will be battling the $75 handicap but has ~2 months of expected upward drift to partially offset it. (0.39)
- 2026-02-13: After 6 months, standard expected stock market returns should roughly equal the $75 drop, neutralizing the handicap and centering the probability again. (0.49)
